full_text:
Yan Wen (Bojian) 閻溫 (伯儉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Wen (閻溫), styledBojian (伯儉), was born in Hanyang. Captured by Ma Chao, when dragged before the walls, he urged the defenders to fight on. Yan Wen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yan Wen lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
